entityFormationAgency.description: California bizfile business entity starting point.

taxAgency.description: California state tax agency starting point.

licensingPortal.description: California permits and licenses starting point by location and activity.

economicDevelopmentAgency.agencyName: California Governor's Office of Business and Economic Development
economicDevelopmentAgency.description: California GO-Biz and CalOSBA resource starting point.

workforceAgency.description: California payroll tax and employer registration starting point.

SBDC.agencyName: California Small Business Development Center Network

VBOC.agencyName: SBA Veterans Business Outreach Center program
VBOC.description: SBA VBOC program information and locator starting point.

commonBusinessSetupTasks.title: Review California entity formation in bizfile
commonBusinessSetupTasks.description: Use bizfile California to review, search, and file business-entity records.
commonBusinessSetupTasks.whenNeeded: Before using a new legal entity for banking, contracts, or tax accounts.
commonBusinessSetupTasks.dependency: Choose the intended legal structure with qualified legal and tax guidance.
commonBusinessSetupTasks.founderNotes: Record entity choice, filing date, entity ID, and professional review.

commonBusinessSetupTasks.title: Search California bizfile entity records
commonBusinessSetupTasks.description: Search California bizfile records before relying on a proposed entity name.
commonBusinessSetupTasks.whenNeeded: Before formation filings or heavy branding spend.
commonBusinessSetupTasks.founderNotes: Record searched names and results. Entity-name availability is not trademark clearance.

commonBusinessSetupTasks.title: Confirm California agent-for-service-of-process requirements
commonBusinessSetupTasks.description: Confirm agent-for-service-of-process requirements for the selected California entity.
commonBusinessSetupTasks.whenNeeded: When forming and maintaining an entity.
commonBusinessSetupTasks.founderNotes: Record the agent and supporting records.

commonBusinessSetupTasks.title: Review California tax-agency registration needs
commonBusinessSetupTasks.description: Use California tax-agency guidance to identify applicable state tax registrations.
commonBusinessSetupTasks.whenNeeded: Before taxable operations or hiring employees.
commonBusinessSetupTasks.dependency: Clarify entity, activity, EIN, and staffing.
commonBusinessSetupTasks.founderNotes: Record agencies, accounts, and filing cadence.

commonBusinessSetupTasks.title: Determine whether a California seller's permit is required
commonBusinessSetupTasks.agency: California Department of Tax and Fee Administration
commonBusinessSetupTasks.description: Use CDTFA registration to determine whether a seller's permit or another permit, license, or account is required.
commonBusinessSetupTasks.whenNeeded: Before selling or leasing taxable tangible personal property or conducting another covered activity.
commonBusinessSetupTasks.founderNotes: Record CDTFA determination, permit, and reporting cadence.

commonBusinessSetupTasks.title: Research California local permits and business licenses with CalGold
commonBusinessSetupTasks.agency: California Governor's Office of Business and Economic Development
commonBusinessSetupTasks.description: Use CalGold as a starting point and verify city and county licenses directly with each applicable agency.
commonBusinessSetupTasks.dependency: Identify address, service area, and activities.
commonBusinessSetupTasks.founderNotes: Record local agencies contacted and written guidance.

commonBusinessSetupTasks.title: Verify California local zoning and occupancy rules
commonBusinessSetupTasks.agency: Applicable California city or county planning department
commonBusinessSetupTasks.description: Use CalGold as a starting point and confirm zoning, occupancy, signage, and site rules locally.
commonBusinessSetupTasks.whenNeeded: Before lease, site purchase, or build-out.
commonBusinessSetupTasks.founderNotes: Record planning contact, address reviewed, and written response.

commonBusinessSetupTasks.title: Review California GO-Biz and CalOSBA resources
commonBusinessSetupTasks.agency: California Governor's Office of Business and Economic Development
commonBusinessSetupTasks.description: Research California small-business, innovation, and economic-development resources.
commonBusinessSetupTasks.whenNeeded: During planning and before location or expansion commitments.
commonBusinessSetupTasks.founderNotes: Record relevant programs and direct eligibility confirmations.

commonBusinessSetupTasks.title: Research California targeted-business support
commonBusinessSetupTasks.agency: California Office of the Small Business Advocate
commonBusinessSetupTasks.description: Research current veteran, woman, minority, rural, and other targeted-business support using founder-selected attributes.
commonBusinessSetupTasks.whenNeeded: During planning and before targeted-program applications.
commonBusinessSetupTasks.dependency: Use founder-selected attributes and verify criteria.
commonBusinessSetupTasks.founderNotes: Record researched programs and eligibility confirmations.

commonBusinessSetupTasks.title: Contact California SBDC
commonBusinessSetupTasks.agency: California Small Business Development Center Network
commonBusinessSetupTasks.description: Use California SBDC advising to review the concept, assumptions, and checklist.
commonBusinessSetupTasks.whenNeeded: During planning and before major spending.
commonBusinessSetupTasks.founderNotes: Record office, counselor, meeting date, and actions.

commonBusinessSetupTasks.title: Apply for an Employer Identification Number directly from the IRS
commonBusinessSetupTasks.description: Use the IRS tool to determine whether the business needs an EIN and apply directly when appropriate. Form a planned legal entity with the state before requesting its EIN.
commonBusinessSetupTasks.whenNeeded: After forming a planned legal entity and before banking, payroll, or tax registrations that require an EIN.
commonBusinessSetupTasks.founderNotes: Apply directly through IRS.gov. Record the EIN confirmation and do not pay a third-party website for an EIN.

commonBusinessSetupTasks.title: Research SCORE mentoring support
commonBusinessSetupTasks.description: Use SCORE's mentoring directory to find business-planning support and review the launch checklist with a mentor.
commonBusinessSetupTasks.whenNeeded: During planning and before major spending commitments.
commonBusinessSetupTasks.founderNotes: Record the mentor contact and the assumptions reviewed.

commonBusinessSetupTasks.title: Research Veterans Business Outreach Center support
commonBusinessSetupTasks.description: Review SBA Veterans Business Outreach Center resources when veteran or military-community business assistance may be useful.
commonBusinessSetupTasks.whenNeeded: During planning, especially when the founder wants veteran or military-community support.
commonBusinessSetupTasks.founderNotes: Record whether VBOC support is relevant and any counselor contact.

commonBusinessSetupTasks.title: Confirm California city/county requirements directly
commonBusinessSetupTasks.agency: Applicable California city or county agency
commonBusinessSetupTasks.description: Some cities, counties, zoning offices, health authorities, and professional boards have requirements that cannot be confirmed from a statewide placeholder. Identify the operating address and contact the local agency directly.
commonBusinessSetupTasks.whenNeeded: Before operating locally, signing a lease, or relying on a local compliance assumption.
commonBusinessSetupTasks.dependency: Identify city, county, operating address, and business activity.
commonBusinessSetupTasks.founderNotes: Record the local agency contacted, date, person or office, and written guidance. This item intentionally has no single statewide URL.

industrySpecificFlags.label: Food, beverage, or health-department review
industrySpecificFlags.description: Triggered when the business may prepare, serve, sell, or handle food or beverages.

tasks.title: Verify California retail-food and local health requirements
tasks.agency: California Department of Public Health and applicable local environmental-health agency
tasks.description: Food businesses must confirm local environmental-health plan-review, permit, inspection, and food-safety requirements.
tasks.whenNeeded: Before food preparation, equipment purchases, or launch.
tasks.dependency: Document menu, preparation model, and locations.
tasks.founderNotes: Record local authority, permits, inspections, and guidance.

industrySpecificFlags.label: Alcohol or liquor licensing review
industrySpecificFlags.description: Triggered when alcohol sales, service, or distribution may apply.

tasks.title: Verify California alcoholic-beverage licensing
tasks.agency: California Department of Alcoholic Beverage Control
tasks.description: Confirm license requirements before selling, serving, or distributing alcohol.
tasks.whenNeeded: Before alcohol-related location or offer commitments.
tasks.founderNotes: Record license type, timeline, and agency guidance.

industrySpecificFlags.label: Construction or contractor licensing review
industrySpecificFlags.description: Triggered when construction, home improvement, installation, repair, or contractor work may apply.

tasks.title: Verify California contractor-license requirements
tasks.description: Confirm whether construction, repair, installation, or contracting work requires CSLB licensure.
tasks.whenNeeded: Before advertising, bidding, or regulated work.
tasks.dependency: Define work scope and qualifying individual.
tasks.founderNotes: Record license classification and CSLB guidance.

industrySpecificFlags.label: Professional licensing review
industrySpecificFlags.description: Triggered when regulated professional services may apply.

tasks.title: Verify California professional licensing
tasks.description: Identify the applicable board and confirm professional-license requirements.
tasks.whenNeeded: Before regulated professional services are offered.
tasks.dependency: Identify exact service and responsible credential holder.
tasks.founderNotes: Record board, credential, renewal, and responsible professional.

industrySpecificFlags.label: Employer, payroll, and workforce review
industrySpecificFlags.description: Triggered when the business plans to hire employees or run payroll.

tasks.title: Register a California employer payroll-tax account
tasks.description: Register an EDD employer payroll-tax account when the business hires employees and reaches the applicable registration threshold.
tasks.whenNeeded: Within the EDD registration window after covered wage payments begin.
tasks.founderNotes: Record EDD account, first-payroll date, and reporting cadence.

tasks.title: Obtain California workers-compensation insurance
tasks.description: California employers must confirm and obtain workers-compensation insurance, including when they have one employee.
tasks.dependency: Document roles and request insurance guidance.
tasks.founderNotes: Record carrier, policy, effective date, and required notices.

tasks.title: Review California unemployment-insurance payroll-tax duties
tasks.description: Review EDD payroll-tax, unemployment-insurance, wage-reporting, and payment responsibilities.
tasks.whenNeeded: When hiring employees and managing payroll.

verifyWarning: Verify with the official California state, local, and activity-specific agency before filing, spending money, signing a lease, hiring, or relying on this checklist.
